summary: Reference Intelligence v2 testing completed successfully. 17/17 backend tests passed. All v2 features working correctly: fuzzy matching (OCR correction, numeric core match, partial overlap), cross-document correlation clusters, enhanced diagnostics endpoint, feedback submission. Frontend MatchingDebugPanel properly displays v2 signal badges and score bar color coding.

minor.issue: Alpha-only references (ABC vs XYZ) return 0.7 score instead of near-zero due to numeric core defaulting to '0'. Edge case behavior, not a blocking issue.

critical_code_review_comments: fuzzy_matching.py implements proper OCR correction map with common substitutions (0↔O, 1↔I, 8↔B, 5↔S, etc.)
compute_fuzzy_match() returns breakdown dict with individual signal scores (numeric_core_match, partial_overlap, ocr_corrected, levenshtein_sim)
cross_document_correlation.py properly initializes MongoDB indexes and handles cluster creation/updates
reference_intelligence_v2.py router includes diagnostics, clusters, feedback, and fuzzy-test endpoints
MatchingDebugPanel.js correctly implements v2 signal badges (v2 Vendor Strategy, v2 Cluster Bonus) and color coding (pink for fuzzy, indigo for contextual, blue for cluster)
seed_data_creation: Feedback submission created label correction pattern for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reference Intelligence v2 is fully functional. Fuzzy matching works for OCR errors, numeric core comparison, and partial matches. Cross-document correlation creates clusters when documents share reference signals. The diagnostics endpoint (/api/reference-intelligence/v2/diagnostics/{doc_id}) returns cluster, vendor_behavior, and v2_signals. Frontend displays cluster badges when applicable.

Part 4 - Clusters.GET /api/reference-intelligence/v2/clust: PASS - returns clusters array and total

Part 5 - Score Breakdown.GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/matching-deb: PASS - returns diagnostics with v2_signals, candidate_scores

verified_ui_elements.MatchingDebugPanel v2 badges: PASS - Cluster badge displays when v2_signals.cluster_id exists
verified_ui_elements.Score bar color coding: PASS - fuzzy_reference_similarity=pink, contextual_similarity=indigo, cluster=blue (verified in code review)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. BC validation fails with auth errors as expected (lab credentials).
